description: Style NoteThese shoes from woodland celebrate the true spirit of adventure and are designed for comfort under extreme conditions.Product Detailscasual shoes with stitch detailing at the seams of the toe boxFive-hole lace ups with metal eyeletsPadded tongue and insole for in-step comfortRubber midsoleTPU outsole with lugs and grooves, curved midfoot and a raised heelMaterial and CareNubuckUse a branded leather conditioner and polish on leather partsUse a suede brush to remove dist from suede partsDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
